segments: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: ليس منا من لم يرحم صغيرنا، ويوقر كبيرنا و يعرف حقنا .
arabic.text: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: ليس منا من لم يرحم صغيرنا، ويوقر كبيرنا و يعرف حقنا .

segments: 6. And with the same chain of narration, it is reported from Abul Qasim, Muhammad ibnAli, Ibn al-Hanafiyya, that the Prophet, peace be upon him and his progeny, said: "He who does not have mercy on our young ones, and shows no reverence to our old ones and does not recognize our rights, is not from us."
en.mulla-asgharali-m-m-jaffer.text: 6. And with the same chain of narration, it is reported from Abul Qasim, Muhammad ibnAli, Ibn al-Hanafiyya, that the Prophet, peace be upon him and his progeny, said: "He who does not have mercy on our young ones, and shows no reverence to our old ones and does not recognize our rights, is not from us."

narratorChain.raw: 6 - وبهذا الإسناد، عن أبي القاسم محمد بن علي ابن الحنفية رحمه الله قال

parts.text: أبي القاسم محمد بن علي ابن الحنفية رحمه الله قال
